titles.title: Lion of Judah Lamb of God

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Messiah would come The earth would rejoice The people start to sing For they would behold As Scripture foretold A mighty King of Kings But He came as a child Not like they had planned Not like they planned

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lion of Judah, Lamb of God, Glorious Conqueror, Suffering Son, Lion of Judah, With nails in His hands The Mighty Redeemer Was meek as a lamb.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: No elegant robes, No glorious throne, No armies at His side, Could this be the One? A carpenter's son? A man condemned to die? But a lion roared Deep inside this Lamb Inside this Man
